purpose: Visual separator between groups of tabs inside an IconTabBar.
whenToUse: Inside IconTabBar between logical tab groups
When tabs span multiple distinct categories
whenNotToUse: For visual padding — adjust itemSpacing instead
doRules: Use to separate logically distinct tab groups (Process / Settings / Help)
dontRules: Do not abuse separators to compensate for tab overcrowding (limit tabs instead)
Do not use multiple separators in a row

layoutGuidance.placement: Place IconTabSeparator inside a compatible container (IconTabBar).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for navigation.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
